text: Today, we’re killing 2,000 integration companies. Including our own. After 12 years of work, we’re open-sourcing the world’s largest integrations knowledge base for AI agents: → connects any AI agent to 250+ apps → plugs it with 47,000+ actions → each API endpoint and auth flow is verified → battle-tested by 17,000 customers We’re making everything open source. Our former company, Pica, is now One. One lets you connect and monitor your AI agents from one place. So instead of stitching together brittle integrations, expired OAuth tokens, rate limits, broken permissions, and random API docs… your agents just work. Here’s what that looks like: → One CLI command to connect to hundreds of apps → precise permissions, so agents can’t go rogue → One Auth Link, so users can share app access without handing over API keys → One Flow, so your agent can run deterministic automations for almost no cost Knowledge should be free. Using it should be affordable. So comment "One" below and repost to get: → UNLIMITED connections → 1M API requests FREE every month → 47,000 integration actions
title: Today, we’re killing 2,000 integration companies.

hook: Phaidra is hiring talented AI Controls Solutions Engineers!
text: Phaidra is hiring talented AI Controls Solutions Engineers! Our hands-on Solutions Engineering team sits at the intersection of AI and data center infrastructure. You will be responsible for applying our AI agents to help control, manage, and optimize our customers' mission-critical AI factories. We're proud to work closely with our partners and customers at NVIDIA, CoreWeave, Applied Digital, Aligned Data Centers, Salute and many other industry leaders to usher in a new age of intelligent and highly-efficient AI infrastructure. Because #everywattcounts Ideal candidates have a deep understanding of data center facility infrastructure — especially BMS/PMS systems and controls — and are comfortable working directly with our data center customers' operations teams whom we serve. Please apply below or reach out to me directly! We're hitting an inflection point where the industry broadly recognizes that agentic AI control is not a nice-to-have — it's a must-have to grow at GW scale.
title: Phaidra is hiring talented AI Controls Solutions Engineers!
